# QuickBooks Online Connector - Full Documentation

# QuickBooks Online Connector 2.0

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for QuickBooks Online (QuickBooks Online Connector) synchronizes data and
automates business processes between QuickBooks Online and third-party applications, either
on-premises or in the cloud.

QuickBooks Online provides cloud-based accounting software that helps companies manage core business
processes, ERP financials, e-commerce, inventory, and more.

For information about compatibility and fixed issues, see the QuickBooks Connector Release Notes.

## Before You Begin

To use this connector, you must be familiar with:

- The QuickBooks API
- Anypoint Connectors
- Mule runtime engine (Mule)
- Elements and global elements in a Mule flow
- How to create a Mule app using Anypoint Studio

Before creating an app, you must have access to:

- The QuickBooks target resource
- Anypoint Platform
- Anypoint Studio or Anypoint Code Builder

## Common Use Cases For the Connector

Common use cases for QuickBooks Online Connector include the following:

- Eliminating data staleness and manual entry errors by automatically syncing your ERP data in
  QuickBooks Online with your accounts and customer data in Salesforce.
- Reducing cycle times by automating business-critical flows across QuickBooks Online and other
  cloud-based and on-premises systems.
- Boosting employee productivity by saving many hours that are otherwise spent keeping your
  QuickBooks Online system in sync with other applications in your IT stack.

## Connection Types

QuickBooks Online Connector uses the OAuth 2.0 authentication type, which delegates user
authentication to the service hosting the user account.

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Use Exchange to Discover Connectors, Templates, and Examples](../../connectors/introduction/intro-use-exchange)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# Upgrading and Migrating Quickbooks Connector to Version 2.0

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Upgrade Anypoint Connector for Quickbooks (Quickbooks Connector) to version 2.x.

## Supported Upgrade Paths

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>From Version</th><th>To Version</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p>1.x</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>2.x</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Changes in This Release

This release contains the following changes:

- Made the following changes to some operations:
  - [Changed operation names](#changed_operations)
  - The **Get query** operation now makes an HTTP GET request instead of an HTTP POST request to the
    `/query` endpoint
  - The **Get invoice by invoice id** operation now makes an HTTP GET request instead of an HTTP
    POST request to the `/invoice/{invoiceId}` endpoint
  - The **Upload** operation now has the **File_content_0-Body** parameter, the
    **File_content_0-Filename** parameter, and the **File_metadata_0-Body** parameter
  - Removed the **Content type** parameter from all operations
  - Removed the **Accept** parameter from all operations
  - Added the **Body** parameter to some operations

- [Added sources](#new_sources)

## Changed Operations

The following table shows changes to operation names:

## New Sources

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Quickbooks Source</th><th>Description</th><th>Parameters</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>On new customer</p></td><td><div><div><p>Triggers an event for every new customer.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p>Configuration</p></li><li><p>Created time</p></li><li><p>Config Ref</p></li><li><p>Primary Node Only</p></li><li><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></li><li><p>Streaming Strategy</p></li><li><p>Redelivery Policy</p></li><li><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></li></ul></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p>On new invoice</p></td><td><div><div><p>Triggers an event for every new invoice.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p>Configuration</p></li><li><p>Created time</p></li><li><p>Config Ref</p></li><li><p>Primary Node Only</p></li><li><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></li><li><p>Streaming Strategy</p></li><li><p>Redelivery Policy</p></li><li><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></li></ul></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p>On new item</p></td><td><div><div><p>Triggers an event for every new item.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p>Configuration</p></li><li><p>Created time</p></li><li><p>Config Ref</p></li><li><p>Primary Node Only</p></li><li><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></li><li><p>Streaming Strategy</p></li><li><p>Redelivery Policy</p></li><li><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></li></ul></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p>On updated customer</p></td><td><div><div><p>Triggers an event for every updated customer.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p>Configuration</p></li><li><p>Last Updated Time</p></li><li><p>Config Ref</p></li><li><p>Primary Node Only</p></li><li><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></li><li><p>Streaming Strategy</p></li><li><p>Redelivery Policy</p></li><li><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></li></ul></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p>On updated invoice</p></td><td><div><div><p>Triggers an event for every updated invoice.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p>Configuration</p></li><li><p>Last Updated Time</p></li><li><p>Config Ref</p></li><li><p>Primary Node Only</p></li><li><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></li><li><p>Streaming Strategy</p></li><li><p>Redelivery Policy</p></li><li><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></li></ul></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p>On updated item</p></td><td><div><div><p>Triggers an event for every updated item.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p>Configuration</p></li><li><p>Last Updated Time</p></li><li><p>Config Ref</p></li><li><p>Primary Node Only</p></li><li><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></li><li><p>Streaming Strategy</p></li><li><p>Redelivery Policy</p></li><li><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></li></ul></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Upgrade Prerequisites

Before you perform the upgrade, you must:

1.  Create a backup of your files, data, and configuration in case you need to restore to the
    previous version.
2.  Install Quickbooks Connector v2.x to replace the Quickbooks operations that were previously
    included in Quickbooks Connector v1.x.

## Upgrade Steps

Follow these steps to perform the upgrade:

1.  In Anypoint Studio, create a Mule project.
2.  In **Mule Palette**, click **Search in Exchange**.
3.  In **Add Dependencies to Project**, enter `quickbooks` in the search field.
4.  In **Available modules**, select **Quickbooks Connector \* and click \*Add**.
5.  Click **Finish**.
6.  Verify that the `quickbooks-connector` dependency version is `2.x.x` in the `pom.xml` file in
    the Mule project.

Studio upgrades the connector automatically.

### Verify the Upgrade

After you install the latest version of the connector, follow these steps to verify the upgrade:

1.  In Studio, verify that there are no errors in the **Problems** or **Console** views.
2.  Verify that there are no problems in the project `pom.xml` file.
3.  Test the connection to verify that the operations work.

## Troubleshooting

If there are problems with caching the parameters and caching the metadata, try restarting Studio.

### Revert the Upgrade

If it is necessary to revert to the previous version of Quickbooks Connector, change the
`quickbooks-connector` dependency version in the projectâs `pom.xml` file to the previous version.

You must update the projectâs `pom.xml` file in Anypoint Studio.

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# QuickBooks Online Connector 2.0 Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

> [!IMPORTANT] As of March 30, 2026 (Sandbox) and April 30, 2026 (Production), the QuickBooks Online
> Accounting API returns `FullyQualifiedName` in the `AccountRef.name` field for all entities and
> transactions. Previously, this field returned values inconsistently.
>
> To avoid integration issues, always use the `AccountRef.value` field when querying for account
> data. This change doesnât affect write operations.
>
> For more information, see
> [Intuitâs announcement on Accounting API changes](https://medium.com/intuitdev/upcoming-changes-to-accounting-apis-that-may-impact-your-application-023386ca2c52).

## Configurations

---

### Config

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Config_Auth">Auth Connection Provider</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td><p>1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td><p>MINUTES</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td><p>AUTO</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The identifier of this element used to reference it in other components</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. Mule purges the instances as appropriate.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Connection Types

##### Auth Connection Provider

Use OAuth 2.0 to delegate user authentication to the service hosting the user account. For more
information, refer to
[Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2) or
[Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors on CloudHub](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2-cloudhub).

###### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Default Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#DefaultHeader">Default Header</a></p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#DefaultQueryParam">Default Query Param</a></p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for establishing connections to the remote service</p></td><td><p>30</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Connection Timeout</p></td><td><p>SECONDS</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Use Persistent Connections</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>If false, each connection will be closed after the first request is completed.</p></td><td><p>true</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Max Connections</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The maximum number of outbound connections to keep open at the same time</p></td><td><p>-1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Idle Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>A timeout for how long a connection can remain idle before it is closed</p></td><td><p>30</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Idle Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the connection Idle Timeout</p></td><td><p>SECONDS</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Proxy Config</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Proxy">Proxy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Reusable configuration element for outbound connections through a proxy</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Stream Response</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether or not received responses should be streamed</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Buffer Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The space in bytes for the buffer where the HTTP response will be stored.</p></td><td><p>-1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Base Uri</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Parameter base URI, each instance/tenant gets its own</p></td><td><p><code>https://sandbox-quickbooks.api.intuit.com/v3/company/{companyId}</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>State</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A String value that you send when the OAuth dance is initiated and that is returned back by the service provider with the token callback.</p></div><div><div data-type="NOTE"><div><p>Although the <strong>State</strong> parameter is optional, QuickBooks requires it. You can pass the <strong>State</strong> parameter either directly to the OAuth dance or pass it through the <strong>Resource Owner Id</strong> (in multi-tenancy environments), for example, <code>/authorize?state=test_state</code>. Failing to do so results in a <code>The state query parameter is missing from the authorization request</code> error from QuickBooks.</p></div><div><p>The <strong>State</strong> parameter will be deprecated in a future release.</p></div></div></div></div></td><td><p>security_token</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>TLS Configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">Tls</a></p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Key</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The OAuth consumerKey as registered with the service provider</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Secret</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The OAuth consumerSecret as registered with the service provider</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorization Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The service providerâs authorization endpoint URL</p></td><td><p><code>https://appcenter.intuit.com/connect/oauth2</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Access Token Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The service providerâs accessToken endpoint URL</p></td><td><p><code>https://oauth.platform.intuit.com/oauth2/v1/tokens/bearer</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scopes</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The OAuth scopes to be requested during the dance. If not provided, it defaults to those in the annotation</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Resource Owner Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The resourceOwnerId which each component should use if it doesnât reference otherwise.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Before</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a flow to execute right before starting the OAuth dance</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>After</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a flow to execute right after an accessToken has been received</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Listener Config</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A reference to a &lt;http:listener-config /&gt; to use to create the listener that will catch the access token callback endpoint.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Callback Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The path of the access token callback endpoint</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorize Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The path of the local http endpoint which triggers the OAuth dance</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>External Callback Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>If the callback endpoint is behind a proxy or should be accessed through a non direct URL, use this parameter to tell the OAuth provider the URL it should use to access the callback</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Object Store</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A reference to the object store that should be used to store each resource owner idâs data. If not specified, runtime will automatically provision the default one.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Operations

## Get account by account id

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:account1get>`

Retrieve an account by Id This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the /account/{accountId}
endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Account Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Account Id</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR

## Create account

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:account-post2>`

Create a new Account This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the /account endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute ## Create account update

### Parameters

to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default ### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Create class

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:class-post3>`

Create a Class object This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the /class endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT

time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Create customer

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:customer-post3>`

Create a customer This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the /customer endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Parameters

to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get employee by employee id

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:employee68get>`

Retrieve an employee object by Id This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/employee/{employeeId} endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default ## Get exchangerate

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:exchangerate-get>`

Get Exchange Rate This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the /exchangerate endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>sourcecurrencycode</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>sourcecurrencycode</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>asofdate</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>asofdate</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get invoice by invoice id

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:invoice147get>`

Read an invoice object by Id This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the /invoice/{invoiceId}
endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Invoice Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Invoice Id</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Parameters

Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:item-idget>`

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A ## Create item

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:item-post3>`

Create an item object This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the /item endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get journalentry by journalentry id

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:journalentry8get>`

Read a journal entry object by Id This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/journalentry/{journalentryId} endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Journalentry Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Journalentry Id</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Create paymentmethod

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:paymentmethod-post3>`

Update a payment method This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the /paymentmethod endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. ## Create purchase

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:purchase-post3>`

Create a purchase object This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the /purchase endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get purchaseorder by purchaseorder id

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:purchaseorder178get>`

Read a purchase-order object This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/purchaseorder/{purchaseorderId} endpoint

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Create refundreceipt

`<quickbooks-online-connector-mule-4:refundreceipt-post3>`

Update a refund-receipt object This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the /refundreceipt
endpoint

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>minorversion</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User Agent</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>the content to use</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit which qualifies the Response Timeout}</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO will automatically define the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">Http Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- QUICKBOOKS-ONLINE-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
